value.details: Stay cozy and stylish this winter with our Women’s Calf Length Woolen Wear, crafted from premium quality wool blend. Designed to provide extra warmth and comfort, its calf-length coverage makes it a perfect choice for chilly days. The fabric is soft, breathable, and skin-friendly, ensuring all-day comfort without irritation. Durable stitching and superior knit guarantee long-lasting use, while the versatile design makes it suitable for both casual and formal wear. A must-have winter essential for every woman’s wardrobe.

specification.name: Other Details
values: Premium Wool Blend – Made with high-quality wool for maximum warmth and comfort., Calf-Length Design – Stylish fit that covers and protects legs in cold weather., Soft & Breathable – Gentle on skin, prevents itchiness, and ensures day-long comfort.
